name: KV Indoor Golf
about: Kennebec Valley Indoor Golf operates as a dedicated indoor golf training facility equipped with aboutGolf simulators. The venue provides a state-of-the-art environment for golf practice, offering swing feedback, play on world-renowned courses, and lessons from PGA professionals. It targets golfers looking to maintain their skills during off-seasons, tune up their game, or learn the sport in a controlled setting. The pricing is structured per person by age group, with options for hourly play and multi-hour passes. It is best suited for individual practice, professional lessons, and casual play without food or beverage service.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end aboutGolf simulators used by the Golf Channel
Access to iconic golf courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB not indicated

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulator used by Golf Channel for instruction

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention club rental in the provided context, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention any food or beverage service or policies regarding outside food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The context does not specify the time required to play 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children under 16 are allowed but must be accompanied by an adult. Special pricing is offered for juniors.
